general.name: CyberArk EPM Managed Login Items
general.payloads: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd"> <plist version="1"><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>C8E7AB9C-D77E-40B4-B042-9CE6864FDAEB</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>Configuration</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>C8E7AB9C-D77E-40B4-B042-9CE6864FDAEB</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>CyberArk EPM Managed Login Items</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>PayloadRemovalDisallowed</key><true/><key>PayloadScope</key><string>System</string><key>PayloadContent</key><array><dict><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Managed Login Items</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>7ABE3742-D11B-4CA2-A364-5288B41ECA39</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>JAMF Software</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.servicemanagement</string><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>7ABE3742-D11B-4CA2-A364-5288B41ECA39</string><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>Rules</key><array><dict><key>RuleType</key><string>BundleIdentifier</string><key>RuleValue</key><string>com.cyberark.CyberArkEPM</string><key>TeamIdentifier</key><string>DF8U2CCCD8</string></dict></array></dict></array></dict></plist>
